title: astragalus recognitus
intro: Astragalus recognitus, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Astragalus recognitus include reducing fatigue and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing overall well-being. Astragalus recognitus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
